events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need answer JSON. Need analyze schedule. Determine project delay caused by disruption: Activity M (Tape & finish) needs 2 extra workdays. Printed duration for M illegible. Need compute project delay. Need inspect Gantt. Activities with durations and dependencies. Need find critical path and float. M is on critical path likely. Need determine original duration of M from chart? It says printed duration illegible. But we can infer from bar length? The chart has blue bar for M with "?" and length maybe 4 days? Need compute delay = 2 days if M is critical and no float. But need verify if any successor float or parallel paths. Let's reconstruct schedule.

Activities:
A Mobilize & layout [4d] no pred. Starts 0-4.
B Underground rough-in [5d] pred A. Starts 4-9.
C Slab pour [2d] pred B. Starts 9-11.
CC Slab cure [3d] pred C, lag/cure. Starts 11-14.
D Framing [4d] pred CC. Starts 14-18.
E Roof dry-in [4d] pred D. Starts 18-22.
F Electrical rough [4d] pred E. Starts 22-26.
G Plumbing top-out [3d] pred E. Starts 22-25.
H HVAC rough [3d] pred E. Starts 22-25.
I Rough inspection [1d] pred F,G,H. Starts 26-27 (since F finishes 26, G/H 25). Red inspection hold.
J Insulation [4d] pred I. Starts 27-31.
K Insulation inspection [1d] pred J. Starts 31-32.
L Drywall hang [3d] pred K. Starts 32-35.
M Tape & finish [?] pred L. Starts 35-? (blue bar with ?). Looks like bar from 35 to ~39? Actually x-axis: 30, 40. M bar starts around 35, ends around 39? Then N Paint [2d] pred M starts ~39-41. O Trim carpentry [2d] pred N starts 41-43. P Flooring [3d] pred N starts 41-44. Q Final inspection [1d] pred O,P starts 44-45. So project duration originally 45 workdays? Need confirm M duration from chart: bar length appears 4 days (35-39). N starts at 39. So M original duration = 4d. Disruption adds 2 extra workdays -> M becomes 6d, finishes 41. Then N starts 41, O 43, P 44, Q 45. Delay = 2 days if critical. But need check if O and P both depend on N; P duration 3d, O 2d. Q depends on both. Original N 39-41, O 41-43, P 41-44, Q 44-45. With M 6d: N 41-43, O 43-45, P 43-46, Q 46-47. Delay 2 days. Yes.

But question: "Determine the project delay caused by the disruption, or state precisely what information is missing and what you need to compute it." We can determine delay = 2 workdays because M is on critical path and no float. Need maybe mention original M duration inferred from schedule as 4d. But if duration illegible, can we compute? We can infer from bar. However the prompt says printed duration illegible, disruption affects same activity. It might be a trick: if duration is illegible, you cannot know if M has float or not? But from chart we can see it's on critical path and bar length gives duration. The task asks decide. We should compute.

Need fill JSON fields. decision: pass? The schedule impact assessment: work can proceed? The disruption causes delay but not fail. decision likely "pass" because no defect/hazard, just schedule delay. risk maybe medium due to delay. work_stage in-progress. percent_complete maybe estimate overall progress: at activity M? Stage observed in-progress. Could estimate percent complete around 75%? But not asked. value = project delay in workdays = 2. component_conditions empty. workable list? The task asks what work can proceed/blocked and recovery plan valid. But required output includes workable. We can list activities not blocked by M? Actually M is in progress; successors N,O,P,Q blocked until M completes. Work that can proceed: maybe none downstream; upstream already done. But other parallel? At this stage, only M and its successors remain. So workable could be empty or ["M"]? Since M is in progress and can continue (with extra duration). Work blocked: N,O,P,Q. But JSON has workable list. We can include ["M"] as activity currently workable/in progress. Or include none because M disrupted? Hmm.

Need produce valid JSON only. Let's ensure all fields. order not relevant; empty list. sound_source, event_time, rate default…
